sentences.english: An increasing number of people are trying to reduce, or even stop, eating meat.
sentences.korean: 점점 더 많은 사람이 건강, 동물 복지, 환경적 이유로 고기 먹는 것을 줄이거나 멈추려 하고 있어요.

sentences.english: This is often for health, animal welfare or environmental reasons.
sentences.korean: 이것은 종종 건강, 동물 복지 또는 환경적 이유 때문이에요.

sentences.english: People are getting their daily amount of protein through plant-based alternatives — meat-free sausages and burgers made using ingredients like soy, tofu or fungi.
sentences.korean: 사람들은 콩, 두부, 균류 같은 재료로 만든 무육 소시지와 버거 같은 식물성 대체품을 통해 일일 단백질을 얻고 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Do You Need to Declutter Your Home?
